description: Automated DJ mix pipeline — template-based ALS generation with multi-signal cue candidate detection (Rekordbox phrases + librosa energy + PWV5 waveform) feeding bass-to-bass transition planning

orchestrator.purpose: Main pipeline controller. --visualize mode for phrase verification

warping.purpose: Per-beat warp markers from Rekordbox grid

als_generator.purpose: Template-based ALS patching, multi-clip per track for loops + viz

rekordbox_reader.purpose: Manual PSSI binary parser for Rekordbox 7 phrase data + PQTZ beat grid

rekordbox_waveform.purpose: PWV5/PWV4 parser — 3-bit RGB + 5-bit height per pixel (LSB-first 16-bit words)

features.purpose: Per-beat librosa RMS + bass + PWV5 with disk cache (path/mtime/version keyed)

phrase_viz.purpose: Factual Interval records + viz-only colour segment collapse

cue_candidates.purpose: Ranked CueCandidate API with confidence + sources + reasons. 5 cue types.

transition.purpose: Two-phase transition planning + per-track PhraseGrid snap + clamp sync + chop-leave-outro-room + dead-air loop refinement

report.purpose: Per-track CSV + per-mix Markdown rationale reports

validation.purpose: Per-track bar/phrase alignment HARD check + overlap range + fade endpoint + dead-air checks

mik_reader.purpose: Mixed In Key 11 GEOB tag + SQLite (MIKStore.db) reader — cues, beat grid, energy segments. Tag-only fallback if DB fails

amplitude_analysis.purpose: 1-second RMS envelope analysis: first_drop / first_break / outro_start / clean-loop-window detector + snap_to_mik_or_beat helper

transition_viz.purpose: Per-transition PNG: both tracks aligned, automation overlay, loop region hatched, tiered phrase grid with bar labels

track_viz.purpose: Per-track PNG: full timeline + RB phrases + MIK cues + energy strip + picked candidates + automation lanes + tiered phrase grid

waveform_preview.purpose: Blank-canvas preview PNG for visual-hint authoring (no picks shown)

desktop_analyzer.purpose: Drives MIK + Rekordbox UIs via pywinauto/pyautogui to analyze tracks without manual clicks. Cursor save+restore so Sam can keep working. MIKStore.db + pyrekordbox for completion polling. Requires RB Library Protection OFF.

sessions.focus: /mix skill + last_bass_drop alignment + desktop automation for MIK+RB
outputs: Test Project/Black Book x Defected V2/Hints/track_hints.json (10 tracks × 4 fields)
